name: Prabhas
title: Rebel Star

heroAura.screenPresence: Commanding and larger-than-life presence with unmatched intensity
heroAura.boxOfficeAppeal: Pan-Indian superstar with ₹5000+ Cr career gross and six ₹100Cr+ openers
heroAura.signature: Powerful action sequences with emotional depth and magnetic screen presence
heroAura.fanbase: Massive pan-Indian following across all demographics and age groups
heroAura.trademarkStyle: Intense stares, powerful dialogue delivery, and physically transformative performances

bio: Prabhas, born October 23, 1979, is India's highest-paid actor and first Pan-Indian star. He achieved unprecedented stardom with Baahubali duology (2015-2017), India's highest-grossing franchise earning ₹2400+ Cr worldwide. Known for intense performances and massive screen presence, he commands ₹150 Cr per film. Recent blockbusters include Saaho (2019), Salaar (2023), and Kalki 2898 AD (2024). With 25+ films and ₹5000+ Cr career gross, Prabhas is the only actor with six ₹100Cr+ worldwide openers. He maintained extraordinary physique for five consecutive years during Baahubali, showcasing unmatched dedication to craft.

quotes.quote: I don't act for awards, I act for my audience. Their love is the biggest award for me.
quotes.context: Interview about Baahubali 2 success at National Film Awards

quotes.quote: I maintained the Baahubali physique for 5 years straight. It was challenging but worth every effort.
quotes.context: Speaking about physical transformation for Baahubali franchise

quotes.quote: Pan-India cinema is not about language but about emotions that connect with everyone.
quotes.context: Discussing rise of Pan-Indian cinema at industry event

quotes.quote: My fans are my strength. I work for them and their happiness drives me.

trivia: First South Indian actor to get wax statue at Madame Tussauds Bangkok (2019)
Maintained same physique for 5 consecutive years during Baahubali filming
Co-owns production house UV Creations
Known for feeding entire film crews elaborate meals during shoots
Never attended his own film premieres or award functions
Rejected 15+ scripts before signing Baahubali
First Indian actor to have six films with ₹100Cr+ worldwide openings
Baahubali 2 is the first Indian film to gross ₹1000+ Cr worldwide
Nephew of legendary actor Krishnam Raju (Rebel Star)
Turned down many Bollywood offers to focus on Telugu cinema
Owns 84-acre farmhouse near Hyderabad
Has cameo in Bollywood film Action Jackson (2014)
Dubbed voice for Manchu Vishnu in Denikaina Ready (2012)

voiceProfile.toneType: Deep and commanding baritone with emotional range
